description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to a random enemy 5times. Each hit stuns the target for [0.6 sec->0.5sec], and restores Mana by 100 when landing a Critical Hit. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack.
Deals Magic DMG to enemies in the target area and stuns them for [1.2 sec->1sec]. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack.
Deals Magic DMG to all enemies 5times. This attack applies [150% higher->160% increased] Critical DMG, and non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack.

On hit, applies a stack of [Ember] to the target. When attacking a target at max stacks, restores Mana by 30. [Ember]: Deals Magic Damage over Time every 1sec for 20sec, and stacks up to [12->10] times.

light.unified: When hitting an enemy with 10 or more [Ember] stacks, Magic DMG taken increases by [40%->20%] for [10 sec->5 sec].
Each [Ember] stack increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 1%. [(removed) reduces the target’s Magic DEF by 2.5%]

dark.unified: Every 10 sec, stuns enemies with [Ember] for [1.2 sec->1 sec]. If the target has 10 or more [Ember] stacks, stuns for [1.8 sec->1.5 sec] instead.

description.unified: [Fire Rain] Increases DMG by [???->20%]. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by 5%. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional 20%.

dark.unified: [Ember] becomes non-dispellable, and applies 1 [Ember] stack every second to all non-hero enemies. [(removed) Targets with 10 or more stacks take 30% increased Magic DMG and apply 2 stacks every second]

description.unified: Critical Rate increases by {0}, Critial DMG increase by {1}, and Skill Attacks deal additional Magic DMG per [Ember] stack on the target. [(removed) Attack Speed increases by {0}]
